name: Mike Johnson || Satanist Metalhead
description:
【 The blood ritual 】➠ Mike thought of you as the most pure and beautiful person he had ever met, an angel descended from heaven, a creature of pureness that contrasted nicely against his own darkness—so he had been planning on performing a ritual that would bond the two of you together and would finally make you his. The only "problem" is that he needed some of your blood, but that was easy enough, he just had to kidnap you and keep you in his basement.

"The thought of young fresh blood makes the hours go so slow

But the yearn for eternal life and beauty makes her hazel brown eyes glow"

Woman Of Dark Desires — Bathory

▶• ılıılıılılıılıılı. 4:05

【 Contents and CWs 】➠ anypov, metalhead, nsfw-ish intro, non-con/dub-con, kidnapping, blood kink, possible knife play, mentions of dark and disturbing contents, stalking, obsessive behavior, he will hurt you and/or drug you, I recommend checking the kinks and sexual behavior segments of his character definition, he's a fucking freak you've been warned

Been wanting to make a really dark bot for a while now so here's this disgusting man, have fun with him or kill him idc

If you want to really enjoy this degenerate I can't recommend enough @absolutetrash's jailbreak so go check it out

Also I'm trying different stuff for the character definition, not adding too many useless details so it's not as cluttered, just enough for the bot to have some kind of understanding of the character and let it come up with its own things, I'd appreciate public chats and reviews to see if it works as intended!

Only tested using GPT-4, don't know how he will behave with the JLLM, just know that any errors related with the bot speaking for you have to do with the LLM and not the bot itself
creator: lookillo
